title: case statement in "order by" clause doesn't work when used together with "group by"
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE a (k INT, b INT, c VARCHAR(10), d FLOAT CHECK (d >= 0));
SELECT SUM(b) FROM a GROUP BY c ORDER BY IF(SUM(b) IS NULL, 1, 0), SUM(b);
key_bug_features: case statement in order by with group by
